button.setup.description: Text in button for performing setup

button.start.description: Button text for initiating certain actions

button.copy.description: Text in button for copying content

button.copied.description: Button text indicating content has been copied

button.restart.description: Button text for regenerating certain content

button.preview.description: Button text for opening a preview of a file via URL

button.seeRawImage.description: Button text for viewing the original image

button.seeRawVideo.description: Button text for viewing the original video

button.edit.description: Text in button for editing content

button.login.description: Text in button for logging in

button.logout.description: Text in button for logging out

button.new.description: Text in button for creating a new item

button.delete.description: Text in button for deleting content

button.confirm.description: Text in button for confirming an action

button.cancel.description: Text in button for canceling an action

button.alert.description: Text in button for issuing an alert

button.info.description: Text in button for displaying information

button.publish.description: Text in button for publishing content

button.watch.description: Text in button for watching content

button.verify.description: Text in button for user real name verification

button.profile.description: Text in button for displaying user profile

button.console.description: Text in button for displaying the console page to control certain content on the webpage

button.learn.description: Text in button for allowing users to learn something

button.buy.description: Text in button for allowing users to purchase something

button.try.description: Text in button for allowing users to try something

button.startForFree.description: Text in button for allowing users to start for free

button.download.description: Text in button for downloading files (e.g., audio, video, images)

button.downloadAndroid.description: Text in button for downloading the Android installation package

button.downloadIos.description: Text in button for downloading the iOS installation package

button.installIos.description: Text in button for installing the iOS app

button.apply.description: Text in button for allowing users to apply for API services

button.refresh.description: Text in button for refreshing the page

button.pay.description: Text in button for allowing users to pay for services

button.repay.description: Text in button for allowing users to continue payment for services

button.applied.description: Text in button indicating the user has applied for the service

button.acquire.description: Text in button for allowing users to obtain API service tokens or keys

button.fillExample.description: Text in button for allowing users to fill in example data

button.buyMore.description: Text in button for allowing users to recharge. Must translate to 'Top Up'.

button.update.description: Text in button for updating content

button.view.description: Text in button for viewing content

button.create.description: Text in button for creating content

button.referralEarnings.description: Text in the button to display referral earnings, meaning users can earn money by inviting others to use the service.

button.finish.description: Text in the button to complete an action.

entity.id.description: The unique identifier for the entity.

entity.website.description: Website name, no translation needed, keep as 'Ace Data Cloud'.

entity.platform.description: Text indicating this is an API service platform.

status.loading.description: Status text displayed while content is loading.

entity.createdAt.description: The time when the entity was created.

entity.updatedAt.description: The time when the entity was updated.

entity.order.description: The order of the entity, which includes monetary and service information that the user needs to pay for.

message.noTasks.message: No historical tasks, please start a new task~
message.noTasks.description: Message displayed when there are no tasks.

message.usedAmount.description: Text to display the amount of service used.

message.mobileAppDescription.message: Use AceData directly on your phone. Currently, Android APK is available for download, and the iOS installation package will be available after signing.
message.mobileAppDescription.description: Description text for the mobile app download page.

message.mobileAndroidHint.message: For Android phones and tablets, scan the code to download the latest APK.
message.mobileAndroidHint.description: Description for the Android download card.

message.mobileAndroidPending.message: The Android installation package is not ready yet, please try again later.
message.mobileAndroidPending.description: Message displayed when the Android installation package is not available.

message.mobileAvailableNow.description: Text to indicate that the Android version is available for download.

message.mobileSecureDelivery.description: Text to emphasize that the download link is delivered via CDN.

message.mobileDirectInstall.description: Text to describe that the Android version is for direct APK installation.

message.mobileLatestRelease.description: Text to indicate that the current display is the latest public version.

message.mobileSharedAccount.message: Shared account and quota with the web version
message.mobileSharedAccount.description: Text to indicate that the mobile version shares the account with the web version.

message.mobileIosHint.message: For iPhone and iPad, install directly online; if the system blocks, you can download the IPA first and then distribute it.
message.mobileIosHint.description: Description for the iOS download card.

message.mobileIosPending.message: The iOS installation package is not available for download yet, it will be provided after completing the Apple certificate and provisioning profile.
message.mobileIosPending.description: Message displayed when the iOS installation package is not available.

message.mobileInstallNote.message: When installing the enterprise or Ad Hoc package for the first time on iOS, the system may require you to trust the certificate in 'Settings > General > VPN & Device Management'.
message.mobileInstallNote.description: Installation prompt for the mobile application.

title.mobileApp.description: Title for the mobile app download page.

title.mobileFastAccess.message: Faster Access, No App Store Detours
title.mobileFastAccess.description: Title for the download page advantage card, emphasizing quick installation.

title.mobileTrustedRelease.message: Centralized Version Management, More Stable Distribution
title.mobileTrustedRelease.description: Title for the download page advantage card, emphasizing version and distribution stability.

title.mobileUnifiedExperience.message: Consistent Experience Across Mobile and Web
title.mobileUnifiedExperience.description: Title for the download page advantage card, emphasizing a unified experience.

nav.mobileApp.description: Entry for mobile app download in the navigation.

message.mobileFastAccess.message: Users can scan the code on their phones for direct installation, or download the APK on the desktop and distribute it to team members, suitable for quick trials and internal testing.
message.mobileFastAccess.description: Advantage description on the download page, emphasizing quick access.

message.mobileTrustedRelease.message: Download links are centralized on one page, with version numbers, platform status, and installation methods visible at a glance, reducing communication costs caused by scattered links.
message.mobileTrustedRelease.description: Advantage description on the download page, emphasizing unified distribution.

message.mobileUnifiedExperience.message: The account system, limits, and service access after login are consistent with the web version, allowing users to switch seamlessly between desktop and mobile.
message.mobileUnifiedExperience.description: Description of the advantages on the download page, emphasizing a unified account experience.

message.remainingAmount.description: Used to display the remaining amount of the service.

message.copied.description: Message indicating that the content has been successfully copied.

message.restart.description: Used to indicate the action to regenerate content.

message.confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete?
message.confirmDelete.description: Message to confirm that the user wants to delete a certain item.

message.expiredAt.description: Used to display the expiration time of the service.

message.free.description: Message indicating that the service is free, meaning the user does not need to pay.

message.startPrice.description: Message displaying the minimum price of the service.

message.joinDiscord.description: Message inviting users to join the Discord channel.

message.addWeChat.description: Message inviting users to add a WeChat account.

message.businessCooperation.description: Message displaying information about business cooperation.

message.noData.description: Message indicating that there is no data in the table or list.

customers.comment1.message: Ace Data Cloud has provided great service to our team, helping us improve productivity. We love it!

customers.comment2.message: Ace Data Cloud is a great integration platform with excellent service quality.

customers.comment3.message: I love the services of Ace Data Cloud, it's easy to use and reasonably priced. I hope it gets better and better!
